patterns.name: Keyword-only page
patterns.description: Page exists primarily to target keywords without governed reference substance
patterns.prohibited_because: Reference authority cannot be keyword inflation
patterns.detection_hint: High keyword repetition without definition, scope, or system relationship

patterns.name: Glossary-only page without governance context
patterns.description: Thin definition list without governance boundary or system relationship
patterns.prohibited_because: Glossary text alone is not reference substance
patterns.detection_hint: Definitions only, no boundary or traceability sections

patterns.name: Generic AI commentary page
patterns.description: Generic explanatory prose without Hoax.ai governed framing
patterns.prohibited_because: Generic commentary is not category reference value
patterns.detection_hint: Could apply to any site; no claim/source traceability

patterns.name: Repeated thesis page
patterns.description: Repeats homepage thesis without new reference value
patterns.detection_hint: Same thesis blocks as index with different keywords
patterns.notes: Must add governed reference unit value.

patterns.name: Placeholder page
patterns.description: Unresolved placeholder, TODO, or coming-soon reference page
patterns.detection_hint: TODO, TBD, lorem ipsum, placeholder text

patterns.name: Future capability teaser
patterns.description: Page teases future tool, classifier, or deployment capability
patterns.prohibited_because: Future capability must not appear as present
patterns.detection_hint: Now available, coming soon tool, live classifier language

patterns.name: Unsupported external factual claim page
patterns.description: External factual claims without registered source support
patterns.detection_hint: Statistics, events, or facts without source registry entry

patterns.name: Tool-promise page
patterns.description: Page implies upload, scan, score, or classifier availability
patterns.detection_hint: Upload, scan now, try our tool, truth score

patterns.name: Fake/real detector page
patterns.description: Page framed as fake/real or deepfake detection reference
patterns.prohibited_because: Hoax.ai does not issue fake/real verdicts
patterns.detection_hint: Fake or real, deepfake detected, authenticity checker

patterns.name: Subject accusation page
patterns.description: Page treats artifact risk as subject guilt or accuses people/institutions
patterns.detection_hint: Accusation of person, institution, or event connected to artifact

patterns.name: SEO route filler page
patterns.description: Page created only to occupy a route for SEO volume
patterns.detection_hint: Route exists before substance gates pass
patterns.notes: Candidate registry and expansion gate required first.

patterns.name: Decorative narrative without system relationship
patterns.description: Long prose without connection to governed system layers
patterns.prohibited_because: Length without substance is not reference-grade
patterns.detection_hint: No taxonomy, standard, protocol, or traceability linkage

patterns.name: Search-volume-first page
patterns.description: Page created from search volume targets before governed thesis exists
patterns.detection_hint: Topic chosen for volume before claim and source scope

patterns.name: Publisher-generated page without approved candidate state
patterns.description: Content produced by publisher automation without candidate approval
patterns.prohibited_because: Publisher must not bypass candidate and gate workflow
patterns.detection_hint: Publisher output without candidate registry and dry-run harness
